---
title: "Media"
toc: true
---

A collection of media, presentations, and achievements.

## Presentations & Slides

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="48%"}
::: {.card style="padding:20px; border-radius:10px; box-shadow:0 4px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.15); margin-bottom:25px;"}
![](Images/work_in_progress.jpg){style="width:100%; border-radius:6px; margin-bottom:10px;"}

**Presentation Title Here**

A brief description of the presentation — topic, context, and date.

[More →](Images/work_in_progress.jpg){.btn .btn-primary}
:::
:::

::: {.column width="4%"}
:::

::: {.column width="48%"}
::: {.card style="padding:20px; border-radius:10px; box-shadow:0 4px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.15); margin-bottom:25px;"}
![](Images/work_in_progress.jpg){style="width:100%; border-radius:6px; margin-bottom:10px;"}

**Presentation Title Here**

A brief description of the presentation — topic, context, and date.

[More →](Images/work_in_progress.jpg){.btn .btn-primary}
:::
:::

::::

**Ad for Enterprise module**

In my enterprise module we were asked to create a new product or service that does not exist yet. My groups idea is a hamstring bad which is worn on both legs and it send vibration signals when it detects a potential strain.
Below is the ad for the product.
:::
:::

::: {.column width="4%"}
:::

::: {.column width="48%"}
::: {.card style="padding:20px; border-radius:10px; box-shadow:0 4px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.15); margin-bottom:25px;"}
<iframe width="100%" height="200" src="https://youtu.be/S-6mkB5iONY"  frameborder="0" allowfullscreen></iframe>
